name: Translation Testing

description:
As a user creating delivery orders
  I want to use an interactive map to select locations
  So that I can accurately specify pickup and delivery addresses

elements.name: Successfully reverse geocode coordinates on map click

steps.name: I am logged in as a customer
the map location picker feature is enabled
I am on the order creation page
I click on a location on the map at coordinates (30.0131, 31.2089)
the reverse geocoding API should be called
I should see the address details for "Salah Salem Street, Giza"
the location should be marked on the map

elements.name: Calculate route between pickup and delivery locations

steps.name: I am logged in as a customer
the map location picker feature is enabled
I have selected a pickup location at "Giza, Egypt"
I select a delivery location at "Cairo Center, Egypt"
the route calculation API should be called
I should see an estimated delivery time
I should see the distance between locations
the route should be displayed on the map

elements.name: Parse Google Maps URL and extract coordinates

steps.name: I am logged in as a customer
the map location picker feature is enabled
I have a Google Maps URL "https://www.google.com/maps?q=30.0444,31.2357"
I paste the URL into the location input field
the system should extract the coordinates (30.0444, 31.2357)
reverse geocode to get the address information
I am logged in as a customer
the map location picker feature is enabled
I have previously used "Al-Azhar University" as a delivery location
I start creating a new order
I should see "Al-Azhar University" in my recent locations
I should be able to select it directly without clicking on the map
I am logged in as a customer
the map location picker feature is enabled
I click on coordinates in a rural area (25.6894, 32.6399)
the reverse geocoding is performed
the system should detect this as a remote area
the delivery parameters should be adjusted accordingly
I am logged in as a customer
the map location picker feature is enabled
I select a pickup location in Egypt
I select a delivery location in Saudi Arabia
the system should identify this as an international delivery
appropriate delivery options should be presented
I am logged in as a customer
the map location picker feature is enabled
the external geocoding service is temporarily unavailable
I click on a location on the map
I should see a fallback address format using coordinates
the order creation should still be possible
I am logged in as a customer
the map location picker feature is enabled
I try to use coordinates outside the valid range (lat: 91, lng: 181)
the location is processed
I should see an error message about invalid coordinates
the location selection should be reset
I am logged in as a customer
the map location picker feature is enabled
the map component is loaded on the order page
the page is loading for the first time
the map should load within 3 seconds
all map controls should be responsive

elements.name: Driver filters orders based on distance preferences

steps.name: I am logged in as a customer
the map location picker feature is enabled
I am a driver with max delivery distance set to 50km
orders are available for bidding
I should only see orders within 50km of my current location
orders beyond 50km should be filtered out
I am logged in as a customer
the map location picker feature is enabled
I am a driver who has opted out of remote area deliveries
orders are listed for bidding
remote area orders should be hidden from my view
only urban area deliveries should be visible

elements.name: Complete order creation with map-selected locations

steps.name: I am logged in as a customer
the map location picker feature is enabled
I have selected pickup and delivery locations using the map
route information has been calculated
I fill in the remaining order details
I submit the order
the order should be created successfully
the location data should be stored correctly
both pickup and delivery addresses should be saved

elements.name: Use map location picker on mobile device

steps.name: I am logged in as a customer
the map location picker feature is enabled
I am using the application on a mobile device
I access the order creation map
the map should be fully functional on mobile
touch interactions should work correctly
the map should be responsive to screen size
I am logged in as a customer
the map location picker feature is enabled
I am a user relying on screen reader
I interact with the map location picker
all interactive elements should have proper ARIA labels
keyboard navigation should be supported
color contrast should meet accessibility standards
I am logged in as a customer
the map location picker feature is enabled
I have set my application language to Arabic
I use the map location picker
all map-related text should appear in Arabic
address display should support Arabic text
location search should work with Arabic input

name: Map Location Picker

description:
As a customer creating delivery orders
  I want an intuitive map interface with smart cascaded address selection
  So that I can precisely and efficiently set pickup and delivery locations

elements.name: Map initializes with user's current location and drag-and-drop markers

steps.name: there is a registered customer account
the customer is logged in
the customer is on the enhanced order creation page
I navigate to the enhanced order creation page
the map should center on my current location with default zoom level
location permission should be requested from the browser
I should see a green pickup marker that is draggable
I should see a red delivery marker that is draggable
both markers should have visual feedback during dragging

elements.name: Drag pickup marker updates address fields automatically

steps.name: there is a registered customer account
the customer is logged in
the customer is on the enhanced order creation page
I can see the pickup location section on the enhanced map
I drag the green pickup marker to a new location on the map
reverse geocoding should automatically fill pickup address fields:
a Google Maps URL should be generated and saved
the coordinate data should be updated for order creation

elements.name: Drag delivery marker with automatic route calculation

steps.name: there is a registered customer account
the customer is logged in
the customer is on the enhanced order creation page
I have set a pickup location via marker drag
I drag the red delivery marker to a new location on the map
reverse geocoding should automatically fill delivery address fields
route calculation should start automatically between the two marker positions
distance and time estimates should appear for all vehicle types:

elements.name: Cascaded country selection loads city options

steps.name: there is a registered customer account
the customer is logged in
the customer is on the enhanced order creation page
I am in manual address entry mode
I select "Egypt" from the country dropdown
the city dropdown should become enabled
the city dropdown should load cities from Egypt (e.g., "Cairo", "Alexandria", "Giza")
area and street dropdowns should remain disabled
selecting a country should clear previously selected city, area, and street

elements.name: Cascaded city selection loads area options and updates map

steps.name: there is a registered customer account
the customer is logged in
the customer is on the enhanced order creation page
I have selected "Egypt" as country
I select "Cairo" from the city dropdown
the area dropdown should become enabled
the area dropdown should load areas from Cairo (e.g., "Tahrir Square", "Zamalek", "Maadi")
the map should automatically center on the selected city
the pickup marker should move to the approximate city center
street dropdown should remain disabled

elements.name: Cascaded area selection loads street options

steps.name: there is a registered customer account
the customer is logged in
the customer is on the enhanced order creation page
I have selected "Egypt" and "Cairo" as country and city
I select "Downtown" from the area dropdown
the street dropdown should become enabled
the street dropdown should load streets from Downtown Cairo
the map should center more precisely on the selected area
the pickup marker should move to the area center

elements.name: Complete cascaded selection updates map and creates order

steps.name: there is a registered customer account
the customer is logged in
the customer is on the enhanced order creation page
I have completed the full cascaded selection for pickup:
the cascaded selection completes
the map should show a precise location pin for Tahrir Street
reverse geocoding should validate and correct any minor coordinate discrepancies
I should be able to proceed with order creation using this cascaded address data

elements.name: Switching between map mode and manual cascaded mode

steps.name: there is a registered customer account
the customer is logged in
the customer is on the enhanced order creation page
I have set a location using the map marker
I switch to manual cascaded entry mode
the cascaded dropdowns should be pre-populated with the map-selected location data:
the map marker should remain at the current position
any changes in cascaded fields should update the map marker position

elements.name: Manual address editing overrides map coordinates

steps.name: there is a registered customer account
the customer is logged in
the customer is on the enhanced order creation page
I have set a location using cascaded dropdowns
I manually edit the building number or floor fields
